ddls:
CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pitching_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season the performance is associated with */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who pitched */,
  "pitches" INTEGER /* Total number of pitches thrown */,
  "zone_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of pitches in the strike zone */,
  "zone_swing_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of swings at pitches in the strike zone */,
  "zone_contact_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of contact made on pitches in the strike zone */,
  "chase_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of pitches outside the strike zone that were chased */,
  "chase_contact_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of contact made on chased pitches */,
  "edge_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of pitches on the edge of the strike zone */,
  "first_pitch_swing_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of swings on the first pitch */,
  "swing_percentage" REAL /* Overall swing percentage */,
  "whiff_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of swings resulting in a miss */,
  "meatball_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of pitches that are considered easy to hit */,
  "meatball_swing_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of swings at easy-to-hit pitches */,
  "game_score" REAL /* Average game score */,
  "inning_score" REAL /* Average score per inning */,
  "inning_frequency" REAL /* Frequency of pitching per inning */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pitching_performance_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pitching_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Player's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Player's last name */,
  "team" TEXT /* Player's team */,
  "position" TEXT /* Player's position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advanced_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance the analytics are associated with */,
  "spin_rate" REAL /* Average spin rate of pitches */,
  "release_velocity" REAL /* Average release velocity of pitches */,
  "extension" REAL /* Average extension of pitches */,
  "break_angle" REAL /* Average break angle of pitches */,
  "break_length" REAL /* Average break length of pitches */,
  "zone_rate" REAL /* Zone rate of pitches */,
  "chase_rate" REAL /* Chase rate of pitches */,
  "whiff_rate" REAL /* Whiff rate of pitches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advanced_analytics_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES pitching_performance ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasonal_comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison record */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season the comparison is associated with */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the metric being compared */,
  "previous_year_value" REAL /* Previous year's value for the metric */,
  "current_year_value" REAL /* Current year's value for the metric */,
  "difference" REAL /* Difference between the current and previous year's values */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasonal_comparisons_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, player) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission record */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role that the permission is associated with */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table that the permission applies to */,
  "read_permission" INTEGER /* Whether the role has read permission for the table */,
  "write_permission" INTEGER /* Whether the role has write permission for the table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., PDF, CSV, table) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "visualization_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., bar chart, line chart, scatter plot) */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Content of the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id")
)
